arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Route 53 Resolver query log configuration.

destination_arn.description: The ARN of the destination resource where the query logs are sent.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Route 53 Resolver query log configuration.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the query log configuration.

share_status.description: Indicates whether the query logging configuration is shared with other AWS accounts.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the query log configuration.
